## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between GrowthX and RAMP Holdings to discuss SEO performance and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog and vendor page performance generally stable with some fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Matt reviewed content refreshes, found persistent issues (e.g., negative tone)](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Decision to stop content refresh project due to misalignment with internal data and resource allocation](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Blog pages: Mostly stable, minor position changes (e.g., "essential benefits" -3 positions)](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Perlin pages: Slight upward trend over 3 weeks, avg positions stable](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Expense category pages: New performance range established, avg positions 13→12](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Traffic drop, but avg performance improved](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Treasury pages: "Liquidity position report" drove cluster growth](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [Vendor pages: New high in sessions, improved performance across various categories](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)

### Content Refresh Project

  - [Limited blog refreshes, performance held steady week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Matt reviewed refreshes, found persistent issues:](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
      - [Negative/overdramatic tone regarding audience challenges](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
      - [Misalignment between internal data and Search Console metrics](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Decision to stop refresh project due to:](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
      - [High opportunity cost for review time](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
      - [Not yet "running on autopilot"](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
      - [Increased internal bandwidth with new contractor hire](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)

### Ongoing Content Work

  - [SEO/SEM tools batch in progress](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Other tool categories for vendor pages scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Sample vendor pages sent for review](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [New vendor pages expected by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/T-Brf8EVE6nk_jUSsyyovPgzWNdNmAkm?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
